profile.name: Prakash Prasad
profile.headline: Assistant QA/QC Engineer
about: I work as an Assistant QA/QC Engineer at PT HLN Batam, where I focus on maintaining quality standards across manufacturing processes through systematic inspection, root cause analysis, and continuous improvement.
My approach combines hands-on quality control techniques with documented management systems to ensure products meet rigorous specifications and regulatory requirements.

research.themes: SPC / ISO Standards / Root Cause Analysis
research.narrative: I am focused on building dependable quality systems that integrate statistical process control, ISO standards compliance, and structured problem-solving methods. My goal is to ensure every product and process meets defined quality thresholds through systematic inspection, data-driven decisions, and continuous improvement frameworks such as CAPA and FMEA.

focus.name: Quality Systems
focus.description: Implementing and maintaining ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, and ISO 19011 compliant quality frameworks.

focus.name: Process Improvement
focus.description: Applying SPC, root cause analysis, 8D reports, FMEA, and CAPA to reduce defects and optimize production quality.

focus.name: Inspections & QA
focus.description: Conducting IQC inspections using SmartScope and other tools to ensure materials and products meet specifications.

focus.name: Quality Tools
focus.description: Building digital tools and dashboards to streamline QA workflows, track defects, and visualize quality metrics.

projects.name: IQC Inspection
projects.summary: A digital system for managing incoming quality inspections, tracking defects, and generating compliance reports.

projects.name: QA Dashboard
projects.summary: An interactive dashboard for monitoring quality KPIs, defect trends, and process capability metrics in real time.

projects.name: Rubber Mfg SPC
projects.summary: A specialized SPC system for rubber manufacturing processes to monitor variability and maintain product consistency.

projects.name: NextGenAcademy
projects.summary: A modern learning platform designed to deliver quality education content with an intuitive user experience.

projects.name: Portfolio Website
projects.summary: A curated portfolio showcasing my QA/QC projects, technical skills, and professional journey.

footer: Building quality systems that deliver reliable results.
